tasks.subject: Task 1: suggestedBump helper + tests in ci-changes.mjs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function (+ CLI) mapping a CHANGELOG [Unreleased] section to a suggested semver bump.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/ci-changes.mjs (add suggestedBump export + suggested-bump CLI)
- Modify: scripts/ci-changes.test.mjs (add tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] suggestedBump: Removed/BREAKING -> major; Added/Changed/Deprecated -> minor; only Fixed/Security -> patch; no [Unreleased] bullets -> null
- [ ] CLI `node scripts/ci-changes.mjs suggested-bump < CHANGELOG.md` prints the bump (nothing when null)
- [ ] new + existing tests pass

**Verify:** node --test scripts/ci-changes.test.mjs

**Steps:** TDD (7 tests), implement suggestedBump after unreleasedBulletCount, add the suggested-bump CLI branch, green, commit. Full code in plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/ci-changes.mjs", "scripts/ci-changes.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/ci-changes.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["suggestedBump heuristic correct (major/minor/patch/null)", "suggested-bump CLI prints bump", "new + existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: release.yml — guided release workflow (picker)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A workflow_dispatch workflow with a patch/minor/major dropdown that runs scripts/release.sh.

**Files:**
- Create: .github/workflows/release.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] workflow_dispatch with a bump choice input (patch/minor/major)
- [ ] Checks out main with the PAT (DEV_BUILD_LABEL_TOKEN) so the tag push triggers build.yml
- [ ] Runs npm ci, sets up Node + Rust, runs SKIP_QA=1 ./scripts/release.sh <bump>
- [ ] actionlint passes

**Verify:** actionlint .github/workflows/release.yml. HARD SAFETY: do NOT run the workflow — it cuts a real release; validate by actionlint + inspection ONLY. Full YAML in plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/release.yml"], "verifyCommand": "actionlint .github/workflows/release.yml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["workflow_dispatch bump choice", "checkout main with PAT", "npm ci + SKIP_QA release.sh", "actionlint passes", "NOT run as a test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: release-suggester.yml — the PR comment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On any PR that adds a new user-facing CHANGELOG [Unreleased] bullet, post/update one marked comment with the suggested bump + the Release-workflow URL.

**Files:**
- Create: .github/workflows/release-suggester.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] pull_request (opened/synchronize/reopened) to main; permissions contents: read, pull-requests: write
- [ ] head vs base unreleased-count; head added a bullet -> release-worthy
- [ ] post/update ONE <!-- release-suggester --> comment with suggested bump + release.yml URL; remove if no longer worthy
- [ ] actionlint passes

**Verify:** actionlint .github/workflows/release-suggester.yml (live behavior validated in Task 5). Reuses Task 1's helper. Full YAML in plan Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/release-suggester.yml"], "verifyCommand": "actionlint .github/workflows/release-suggester.yml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pull_request + pull-requests: write", "head>base unreleased-count detection", "marked comment post/update/remove with bump + URL", "actionlint passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: RELEASING.md — release-worthiness definition
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A short section codifying what release-worthy means, the single source of truth the suggester links to.

**Files:**
- Modify: RELEASING.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] A What's release-worthy section: user-facing (adds a CHANGELOG [Unreleased] bullet) = release-worthy; internal-only is not

**Verify:** Read RELEASING.md; the section is present and matches the suggester rule. Full text in plan Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["RELEASING.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -qi release-worthy RELEASING.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Whats release-worthy section present", "matches suggester rule (user-facing = [Unreleased] bullet)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Validate live (suggester) + land the feature
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the suggester comments correctly on a real PR, confirm release.yml by inspection (NOT by running it), then land the feature on main.

**Files:** none (operational).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] On a PR adding a user-facing [Unreleased] bullet, the suggester posts the marked comment with the correct bump + the release.yml Run URL
- [ ] On a PR with no new [Unreleased] bullet (or no-changelog), no comment
- [ ] release.yml confirmed via actionlint + inspection — NOT run (running it cuts a real release)
- [ ] Feature PR CI-green and merged by maintainer admin-merge; merging does NOT trigger a release

**Verify:** gh pr view <pr> --json comments shows the marked comment with the right bump; gh release view --json tagName stays v1.6.1 throughout.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh pr view PR --json comments && gh release view --json tagName", "acceptanceCriteria": ["suggester comments correctly (right bump + URL)", "no comment on internal-only PR", "release.yml NOT run; release tag unchanged", "feature merged, no release fired"]}
```
